description: The Clan Galasso di Poggiomarino was a Camorra organization operating in the hinterland east of Naples, based in Poggiomarino. Led by Pasquale Galasso and his brother Martino, it was considered one of the most powerful and ferocious clans in Camorra history, controlling neighboring municipalities and most public contracts in the province of Naples. The clan declined in the 1990s after Pasquale Galasso's arrest in 1992 and subsequent collaboration with justice.
